name: Guard Crossbow
description: Village guards are usually recruited from peasantry, where most are already familiar with a bow. As for town guards, it takes much less effort to arm them with crossbows than teach them archery from scratch.
descriptionZh: 村里的卫兵多数出身农家，入伍之前就已经熟悉弓箭。城里的守卫就不是这么回事了，与其从零教他们习弓练箭，不如直接配弩。
